title: Anthropic Introduced Claude Mythos 5 For Trusted Access
summary: Anthropic's June 9 announcement introduced Claude Mythos 5 with a 1M-token context window, 128k maximum output tokens, adaptive thinking, and approval-gated API availability for Project Glasswing participants and trusted partners.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Verify Project Glasswing or trusted-partner approval, model id availability, quota, and routing policy before adding Claude Mythos 5 to production allowlists.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: official announcement lists Claude Mythos 5 at USD 15 per million input tokens and USD 75 per million output tokens

impacts.recommended_action: Benchmark cost and token usage separately from Claude Fable 5 before exposing Mythos 5 to agent or long-context workloads.

detail.migration_notes: This event records approval-gated Mythos 5 availability. APW does not assert broad public availability, account eligibility, region coverage, rate limits, or workload suitability.

limitations: APW records normalized factual metadata only; no provider announcement body is copied.
Access is approval-gated and may not be available to ordinary Anthropic API accounts.
